questionHtml: State one additional assumption that the researchers are making in choosing this distribution.
markschemeHtml:
EITHER

the probability of each component developing cracks is independent of all the other components in the sample.          R1


Note: Do not accept the word “independence” on its own. Appropriate context must be seen.


OR

the development of cracks can be partitioned into two clear groups          R1


Note: Do not accept ‘the samples are representative of the population’.

[1 mark]

meta.title: State one additional assumption that the researchers are making in choosing this distribution.
breadcrumbLabels: AHL 4.18—T and Z test, type I and II errors
